pageContext.name: The Beatles Sgt. Pepper
pageContext.description: Celebrate the most revered album by the most popular rock band of all time, The Beatles! Join the Lonely Hearts Club Band in a whole new dimension as John, Paul, George, and Ringo celebrate this iconic scene with a little help from their friends.  This collectible shadowbox art piece measures 14' x 14' x 2 1/2' and comes with an official Beatles Sgt. Pepper Certificate of Authenticity (COA).  Each piece is printed on 1/8 thick optical-grade acrylic with vibrant UV cured inks and set in a high-quality finished MDF wood frame, our shadowbox art pieces are handcrafted in Eau Claire, Wisconsin.  All you Beatles fanatics out there, be sure to adorn your walls with this lovely Sgt. Pepper Shadow Box today!
